docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($85.00 SERVICE FEE) SERVED MAR-27-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TOOLAJIAN, BRIAN DBA GREENTECH CABINETRY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $819.27 FILED BY MACMURRAY PACIFIC AS TO DEFENDANT TOOLAJIAN, BRIAN DBA GREENTECH CABINETRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ARON AHLAM, ASSISTANT CREDIT MANAGER. DEFENDANT BRIAN TOOLAJIAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACMURRAY PACIFIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOOLAJIAN, BRIAN DBA GREENTECH CABINETRY $819.27 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $934.27 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
